name: Guizang Social Card
description_en: Generate Xiaohongshu carousels and WeChat-style social cards from your content with consistent visual styling.
description_zh: 从你的内容生成小红书图文与微信风格的社交卡片,保持统一的视觉风格。
long_en: A design skill that lays out social-media cards (Xiaohongshu carousels, WeChat cards) so a coding agent can produce share-ready visuals.
long_zh: 排版社交媒体卡片(小红书图文、微信卡片)的设计技能,让编码智能体产出可直接分享的视觉物料。
sec_note_en: Produces local image/HTML assets; review before publishing.
sec_note_zh: 产出本地图片/HTML 物料;发布前请审阅。
